description_long: This is a two-story suburban house situated on a rectangular grassy lot bordered by a sidewalk and a street with streetlights. The house features a complex, multi-gabled roof with gray shingles and a covered front porch supported by columns. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige or tan color, and the windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with a mix of single and double windows on each side. The property includes paved walkways leading from the street to the porch and around the house, as well as a fire hydrant and several street lamps along the curb. The overall design suggests a Craftsman-inspired style with modern suburban elements, and the house appears to be constructed primarily from wood and concrete with glass windows.
description: A two-story suburban house with a multi-gabled gray roof, beige walls, a covered porch, and asymmetrical windows, set on a grassy lot with walkways and streetlights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, steps, columns, and the street with streetlights and a fire hydrant.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended porch, multiple windows, and the continuation of the sidewalk and streetlights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with fewer windows and the intersecting walkways on the grassy lot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the porch from a different angle, and the boundary wall with streetlights.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, columns, and a single main door under a roof overhang
